word: H7929 - שִׁכְמָה - shikmâh - shik-maw' - Shoulder blade

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁכמה

Transliteration: shikmâh

Phonetic: shik-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. shoulder, back
    1. shoulder, shoulder-blade
    2. back (in general)

Origin: from H7926

TWOT entry: 2386a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
